entries.title: Architecture diagram informal headers diverge from spec — testers assert against wrong strings
Procedure: verify section order from SPEC before spawning formatter or test-plan agent
SPEC is authoritative over IMPLEMENTATION-BRIEF for section ordering — spawn formatter agent from SPEC directly
Security reviewer must verify artifact paths exist before cold-read orientation
Agent reports omit Knowledge Stewardship section unless structurally enforced — recurring pattern (col-022, col-028, nan-009, crt-030)
